name: Carl
manager_notes: Carl has been noticeably negative in recent team meetings, which is unusual and starting to affect collaboration. I want this growth conversation to uncover whether that shift comes from frustration, unclear direction, or feeling blocked at current scope. I also need to understand what growth path Carl believes is realistic from a mid-level design role and where support from me is missing. The goal is to leave with one concrete growth focus and one behavior reset for team interactions.
answers: I know I have sounded negative lately, and I am not proud of that.
A lot of it is frustration that feedback loops feel messy and slow.
I want to grow beyond execution into stronger product influence.
Right now I am not clear what skills would actually move me forward.
In meetings I get sharp when I feel design concerns are dismissed.
I could handle that better, but I also need clearer expectations.
A concrete growth goal for this quarter would help me refocus.
If we align on one step and one behavior change, I can commit to it.
